description_long: This is a single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a streamlined fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme, reminiscent of World War II-era fighter aircraft. The wings are straight with slight dihedral angles and display prominent black crosses, while the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, both with yellow tips. The cockpit is positioned just behind the propeller, enclosed with a clear canopy, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The landing gear is in a taildragger arrangement, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The propeller is large and mounted at the nose, and the overall construction suggests a metal airframe with glass canopy and rubber tires.
description: A camouflaged, single-propeller, low-wing monoplane with a streamlined body, enclosed cockpit, and taildragger landing gear, featuring black crosses and yellow accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large nose-mounted propeller, symmetrical wings, and the narrow profile of the fuselage.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the cockpit canopy, wing markings, and the main landing gear under the wing.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, camouflage pattern, and cross insignias on the wings and tail.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the tail section, horizontal stabilizers, and the rear landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing monoplane with straight wings and slight dihedral angle, no winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a large propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed gear under the wings and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy just behind the propeller.
